message: Jake
Jennifer
I always thought you would come someday.
Could you predict it?
That's true.
You can probably somehow sense things about the person you like.
She said this with a slightly lonely smile.
I have something I want to ask.
Have you ever thought about the end of the world?
Huh?
The current world is just heading towards its demise. For the world to be saved, we need the Holy Mother's resurrection.
Since when did you become a religious figure?
My role has already ended.
All that's left is for the Holy Mother to rise again.
? I can’t understand what you’re talking about.
I’m already tired. My role is over, and it’s about time I can be relieved too. I’ve met you, so I have no regrets.
She intends to die.
Leaving everything a mystery, she plans to die.
Right now, when I don’t understand anything, I couldn't let her die.
I want you to explain what you’ve done in a way that I can understand.
Selfish.
But fine, since it’s the last time, I’ll grant your wishes.
Thank you.
The serial murder case is the work of both Charlie and me. He was trying to kill one person at a time in various places to create the Holy Mother's body.
Who is Charlie?
Charlie is a depressed patient introduced to me by Günter. I was accompanying him for my role preparation.
He's a man?
Yes. That was the trigger for everything.
After falling into depression, Charlie starts hearing the voice of God. So, he ends up making a vessel for the Holy Mother’s resurrection as commanded by God.
Has he already gone mad?
Most likely, but I only learned that after that incident.
I witnessed him murder a third girl. She was still a young girl.
Before I knew it, I was screaming, you see, and I was excitedly violated by him for some reason at that time, Charlie was the man who killed my mother.
I still don't understand why, but I ended up killing him, thinking he was my mother's enemy.
That was self-defense.
Maybe so.
But I learned of what he was going to do. So, as atonement for him,
that's a misguided way of thinking.
No, it's not wrong. It's to save this world; it's a beautiful act full of love for humanity.
And that's how it was finally completed. The vessel of the Holy Mother created with the sacred number eight.
I think that’s wrong. No matter how grand your words are, murder is a crime.
Why would doing something for God be a sin? It's you who is mistaken.
You may have forgotten already, but I won’t forget your sins.
What do you mean?
You let my sister die, didn’t you? My sister, who showed devoted love to someone like you, a homeless person.
Huh?
? Oh, you are.
That's right. I'm Melissa's sister. The first man my sister loved, after becoming a man-hater from our mother’s brutal murder, was you.
Melissa, who died protecting me... Her sister...
is who you’re talking to.
That is,
I did something unforgivable.
My sister died protecting you, didn't she? Guy approached me thinking I might be her sister.
!? No way, did you kill Guy and Kristy too?
Of course! You recovered thanks to my sister. Claiming you did something about it is a joke.
That's not funny.
Wasn't it Guy and Kristy who were killed by Meryl? But if that’s the case, why is Meryl
She probably just got tired of living.
To take the blame for that reason.
It must have been shocking for her to lose her daughter. I can understand her feelings now.
Why?
Because I feel like I want to give up on everything. When you lose your goal, you just stop caring.
It's wrong for Meryl to take the blame.
That kind of thing shouldn't happen.
You know Meryl is innocent.
How can you talk about God and pull something like that!?
I don’t care about her.
I'm so tired.
Leave me alone.
If you leave me alone here,
I might die.
I couldn't do that.
No, if I leave you alone,
It's fine now.
I can go to God. I have no regrets.
I’m glad I met you.
At first, I approached thinking you were my sister's enemy, but I became drawn to you and fell in love.
Goodbye, I’m happy you came.
Wait,
You can’t die, turn yourself in.
Let’s escape together, with me.
You want me to turn myself in?
No matter how you feel, in this world, a sinner is a sinner. But if you turn yourself in, your sentence will be reduced.
No way. I’d lose the status and fame I built as an actress.
If that’s the case, I’d rather.
For a moment,
I felt tears shine in her eyes.
In that instant, she pulled out the scalpel and aimed it at her own neck.
Blood gushes out violently from her neck.
Soon, the surroundings will be enveloped in dusk.
It was still a chilly season as the sun fell.
I, already
have no strength to work for God. I'm just a woman terrified by nightmares.
Everything until now has been a dream. You just haven't woken up from the dream.
Dream?
Is everything until now just a dream? That's
there's nothing to worry about. Now, let's go together,
but with that,
if this isn't a dream, I would be a burden to you.
It's fine, you don't have to worry. You've been dreaming a nightmare.
Next time, let's have a happy dream together.
Come on, let's go, precisely, into the waves of dreams.
Let's go somewhere together. A place where no one knows us.
Thank you, I didn't expect such kind words from you.
That's not true. I care about you.
Maybe, if I go with you, I'll end up unhappy.
You won't know unless you try.
No, I know. You could easily embrace other women, right?
That's not okay. I can't allow that.
I'm sorry. And,
I'm already feeling kind of tired.
Feeling tired?
let's forget the bad things and live happily together.
Stop it, you really don't have those feelings, do you? It's enough now.
For a moment,
it felt like tears shone in her eyes.
In an instant, she took out the scalpel and turned it on her own neck.
Such things
are.
Blood gushes out violently from her neck.
It will soon be enveloped by dusk.
It was still the season when the skin felt chilly as the sun set.
